data.body: Retail storefront occupancy in Center City has climbed to its highest level in two years, hitting 84.2% in March, according to the Center City District’s latest survey. That’s up from 82.6% just six months ago and represents a net gain of 32 occupied storefronts since September 2025.

(3/31) South Utsire
Wind: Southerly or southeasterly 6 to gale 8 decreasing 4 to 6.
Sea state: Moderate or rough.
Weather: Rain and fog patches, then showers later.
Visibility: Moderate or good, occasionally very poor until later.
